'''Task Force Summer''' was one of five [[Task force/Legends|task forces]] of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet's]] [[New Republic Fourth Fleet|Fourth Battle Group]]. During the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], Summer was placed under the temporary command of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Battle Group]], paired with [[Task Force Apex]] and led by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Farley Carson]]. It served in [[General/Legends|General]] [[Etahn A'baht]]'s plan that culminated in [[Operation Strong Hand]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
